{"author": null, "closed_at": null, "collaborating_teams": null, "collaborating_users": null, "created_at": null, "credits": [], "credits_detailed": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-45810", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:R/S:C/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}}, "cwe_ids": ["CWE-639"], "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-639", "name": "Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key"}], "description": "### Impact

A missing check of a relation allowed authenticated users with access to any file comment, to read the content of all comments.

### Patches

It is recommended that the Nextcloud Server is upgraded to 31.0.12 or 32.0.3
It is recommended that the Nextcloud Enterprise Server is upgraded to 21.0.9.20, 22.2.10.35, 23.0.12.31, 24.0.12.30, 25.0.13.25, 26.0.13.22, 27.1.11.22, 28.0.14.13, 29.0.16.10, 30.0.17.5, 31.0.12 or 32.0.3

### Workarounds

* No workaround available

### References

* [HackerOne](https://hackerone.com/reports/3425534)
* [PullRequest](https://github.com/nextcloud/server/pull/56982)

### For more information

If you have any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Create a post in [nextcloud/security-advisories](https://github.com/nextcloud/security-advisories/discussions)

title: Propfind requests for file comments allowed to load comments for other files
